ingredients.name: Nishikatsu Seitai arbre

ingredients.address: Japan, 〒177-0063 Tokyo, Nerima City, Higashioizumi, 3 Chome−30−9 昭栄マンション 103

ingredients.name: Heisei Tsutsuji Park
ingredients.localName: 練馬区立平成つつじ公園
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-17-6 Nerima, Nerima City, Tokyo 176-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This azalea-filled park is where Kousei first encounters Kaori in episode 1, the unforgettable scene where she plays a keyboard on playground equipment surrounded by children and cherry blossoms. The park hosts a real Tsutsuji Festival each spring, making it a seasonal pilgrimage highlight adjacent to Towa Hall.

ingredients.name: croir
ingredients.localName: クロワール
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒822-0008 Fukuoka, Nogata, Yunohara, 2 Chome−16−8

ingredients.name: Nerima Culture Center
ingredients.localName: 練馬区立練馬文化センター
ingredients.type: コンサート ホール
categories: コンサート ホール
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-17-37 Nerima, Nerima City, Tokyo 176-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This concert hall is the real-world model for "Towa Hall," the performance venue that appears throughout the series as the site of piano and violin competitions. It is where Kousei first lays eyes on Kaori as she happily plays a harmonica, the chance encounter that sets the entire story in motion. The Nerima Ward Tourist Information Center nearby distributes free pilgrimage maps of the area.

ingredients.name: Repark Kamishakujii 4-Chome #4
ingredients.localName: リパーク 上石神井４丁目第４
ingredients.address: 4 Chome-12-9 Kamishakujii, Nerima City, Tokyo 177-0044, Japan

ingredients.name: Ohayo Children's Playground
ingredients.localName: 練馬区立おはよう児童遊園
ingredients.address: 6 Chome-2 Shakujiidai, Nerima City, Tokyo 177-0045, Japan

ingredients.name: Sayama-fudoji Temple
ingredients.localName: 不動寺
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒359-1153 Saitama, Tokorozawa, Kamiyamaguchi, 2214
ingredients.entityContext: The distinctive temple gate at this historic Saitama site is the real-world model for a temple scene in episode 16, confirmed by anime pilgrimage community comparisons. The gate's architecture closely matches the background art used in the series.

ingredients.name: Kubota Hospital
ingredients.localName: 久保田産婦人科病院
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-29-10 Higashioizumi, Nerima City, Tokyo 178-0063, Japan

ingredients.name: Wine & Liqueur Hayashi
ingredients.localName: ワイン＆リキュール ハヤシ
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒167-0022 Tokyo, Suginami City, Shimoigusa, 4 Chome−4−16 カサデフローラ 201

ingredients.name: LIP hair design
ingredients.address: 〒202-0012 Tokyo, Nishitokyo, Higashicho, 4 Chome−15−14 ユーハイツ 101 LIP hair design

ingredients.name: Rune Kodaira
ingredients.localName: ルネこだいら
ingredients.type: コンサート ホール
categories: コンサート ホール
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-8-5 Misonocho, Kodaira, Tokyo 187-0041, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kodaira Citizens Cultural Hall, known as Rune Kodaira, is a confirmed real-world model for a competition concert hall featured in the series. The exterior shot outside this hall appears in multiple episodes and is one of the primary pilgrimage stops on the Your Lie in April Kodaira route.

ingredients.name: Barber Oyamatsu
ingredients.localName: 理容オヤマツ
ingredients.address: 5 Chome-19-1 Minamioizumi, Nerima City, Tokyo 178-0064, Japan

ingredients.name: Butcher's Table
ingredients.localName: ブッチャーズテーブル
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-9-18 Higashioizumi, Nerima City, Tokyo 178-0063, Japan

ingredients.name: Ekoda Sengen Shrine
ingredients.localName: 江古田浅間神社
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-59-2 Kotakecho, 練馬区 Nerima City, Tokyo 176-0004, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Shinto shrine near Ekoda Station is the real-world model for the shrine Kousei visits with his piano teacher Hiroko and her daughter Koharu in episode 12. The shrine's path and torii gate appear in the scene, though the anime depiction is slightly more spacious than the actual site.

ingredients.name: Nerima Ward Higashinakamae Forest Green Space
ingredients.localName: 練馬区立東中前の森緑地
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒178-0064 Tokyo, Nerima City, Minamioizumi, 4 Chome−39

ingredients.name: Shakujii Park
ingredients.localName: 石神井公園
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-26-1 Shakujiidai, Nerima City, Tokyo 177-0045, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Shakujii Park is the heart of Your Lie in April's Nerima pilgrimage, appearing from episode 1 onward. The scene where Kaori chases a stray black cat through the park's back alleys, past the two ponds and under the cherry blossoms, is one of the most recreated shots by fans. During spring, the Somei Yoshino cherry blossoms along Shakujii Pond perfectly recreate the anime's iconic opening imagery.

ingredients.name: Time Parking Higashioizumi
ingredients.localName: タイムパーキング 東大泉
ingredients.address: 4 Chome-10-33 Higashioizumi, Nerima City, Tokyo 178-0063, Japan

ingredients.name: Nerima Icho Namiki Green Space
ingredients.localName: 練馬いちょう並木緑地
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-16-1 Nerima, Nerima City, Tokyo 176-0001, Japan

ingredients.name: dream egg
ingredients.localName: 夢のたまご
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒285-0843 Chiba, Sakura, Nakashizu, 6 Chome−15−24

ingredients.name: 7-Eleven Nerima Shakujiidai 8-chome store
ingredients.localName: セブン-イレブン 練馬石神井台８丁目店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.address: 8 Chome-21-15 Shakujiidai, Nerima City, Tokyo 177-0045, Japan

ingredients.name: Koenji North Park
ingredients.localName: 高円寺北公園
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-20-15 Koenjikita, Suginami City, Tokyo 166-0002, Japan

ingredients.name: La Primeur
ingredients.localName: ラ・プリムール
ingredients.address: パークサイドＵ, 2 Chome-35-22 Shakujiidai, Nerima City, Tokyo 177-0045, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This real Nerima bakery and cafe is the model for the patisserie Kaori drags Kousei into in episode 3, the scene where she impulsively decides he should play the cafe piano. Fans visit to order the caramel-and-nuts set that Kaori orders in the anime, available on weekends from 2pm, making it one of the most interactive pilgrimage stops in the series.

ingredients.name: Koremasa softball field B side
ingredients.localName: 是政ソフトボール場Ｂ面
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒183-0014 Tokyo, Fuchu, Koremasa, 4 Chome

ingredients.name: Toei Minami-Tanaka Apartment Children's Amusement Park
ingredients.localName: 都営南田中アパート 児童遊園
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒177-0035 Tokyo, Nerima City, Minamitanaka, 3 Chome−31

ingredients.name: Maedori Bridge
ingredients.localName: 前通り橋
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒352-0033 Saitama, Niiza, 11
ingredients.entityContext: This pedestrian bridge over the Kuromoku River in Niiza, Saitama is the real-world model for "Doryo Bridge" in the anime, where Kousei and his friends share a conversation while fireflies float around them. The bridge appears in episode 5 and is also glimpsed in the opening sequence, making it a confirmed and documented pilgrimage site.

ingredients.name: Inamuragasaki Park
ingredients.localName: 鎌倉海浜公園稲村ヶ崎地区
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-19 Inamuragasaki, Kamakura, Kanagawa 248-0024, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Inamuragasaki Park on the Kamakura coast is the real-world beach setting for episode 14, where Tsubaki orchestrates a group training session on the sand and the series briefly shifts to the seaside. The cape view here also appears in the anime's opening credits. It is the only coastal pilgrimage site in the series and a striking contrast to the Nerima neighborhood locations.

ingredients.name: Nerima City Izumikobushi Park
ingredients.localName: 練馬区立泉こぶし公園
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-25-5 Higashioizumi, Nerima City, Tokyo 178-0063, Japan

ingredients.name: Baseball Field A
ingredients.localName: 石神井公園 Ａ地区野球場
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-26-1 Shakujiidai, Nerima City, Tokyo 177-0045, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This baseball field sits within Shakujii Park and appears as part of the opening episode's background scenery. It is adjacent to the park management office area where Kaori's cat-chase scene unfolds, and pilgrimage guides note the vending machine near the field as a specific scene reference point.

ingredients.name: Kawaguchi Lilia
ingredients.localName: 川口総合文化センター・リリア
ingredients.type: コンサート ホール
categories: コンサート ホール
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-1-1 Kawaguchi, Saitama 332-0015, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kawaguchi Lilia is a real Saitama concert hall featured as a competition venue in episode 18. The hall's exterior and lobby are used as a background for scenes during the final rounds of the piano competition arc, and pilgrimage bloggers documented visiting it in 2016 as part of the Your Lie in April location tour.

ingredients.name: Kuriningunowako Nakajimabashiten
ingredients.localName: クリーニングの和光 大泉学園店
ingredients.address: 4 Chome-27-40 Higashioizumi, Nerima City, Tokyo 178-0063, Japan

ingredients.name: cinq Terrace
ingredients.localName: cinq Terrace
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒177-0041 Tokyo, Nerima City, Shakujiimachi, 6 Chome−29−17

ingredients.localName: 新宿区立落合公園
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-14-14 Nakai, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 161-0035, Japan
